summary: Frontend-only mobile web testing completed for Waltrack tabs and core flows. App loads and most primary flows work, but transaction edit/delete flow is blocked in automation by modal viewport interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Edit modal interactive elements become outside viewport on 375x667, causing click failure during edit flow (amount/category/note update could not be completed reliably).
Edit/Delete icon buttons are 36x36, below recommended 44x44 mobile touch target.
Currency toggle chips have 36px height, below recommended 44px touch target on mobile.

integration_issues.issue: Could not complete edit-save verification in automation due viewport/visibility issues in modal interactions after opening edit.

issues: Some interactive controls are below 44x44 recommended touch target size

action_items: Fix transactions edit modal layout/scroll behavior for 375x667 so category chips and save controls are always interactable
Re-test transactions edit flow end-to-end: update amount + category + note and verify persisted list values
Increase touch targets for edit/delete icon buttons and dashboard currency chips to at least 44x44
Optionally add stable testID for bottom tabs to improve deterministic automation
critical_code_review_comments: useExpenseStore uses direct state snapshots in async mutators (add/update/delete/setters). Rapid sequential actions can cause stale-state overwrites; functional setState updater would be safer.
No runtime crash observed in this run, but console shows RN web deprecation warnings for shadow* props and pointerEvents.
seed_data_creation: Created test expenses via UI notes: TEST_ride and TEST_flow3 during automation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified: app load, tab navigation, add expense save, dashboard currency toggle, dashboard budget edit, transaction list display, and insights cards. Blocker remains around edit modal interactions at mobile viewport.
rca_of_issue: Repro: On mobile viewport 375x667, open Transactions -> tap first edit button -> interact with modal controls. Playwright repeatedly reports target elements outside viewport when clicking edit modal title/category controls. Likely modal content/positioning overflow issue with KeyboardAvoidingView + bottom sheet layout on web preview. Mitigation: make modal content scrollable (e.g., ScrollView inside modal), ensure controls remain inside viewport and avoid reliance on off-screen elements.
